subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who was named 'Servant' before 'Alí, and We give him the glad tidings of Our signs, Our loving-kindness and Our mercy that hath encompassed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و نذکر من سمی بالعبد قبل علی و نبشره بایاتی و عنایتی و رحمتی التی احاطت
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
